entity.label: Mesha
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A plain in that part of the boundaries of Arabia inhabited by the descendants of Joktan (Gen. 10:30).

nodes.label: Mesha
nodes.description: A plain in that part of the boundaries of Arabia inhabited by the descendants of Joktan (Gen. 10:30).

verses.text: And their dwelling was from Mesha, as thou goest unto Sephar a mount of the east.
